meaning: adj.声名狼藉的,破烂不堪的
examples: It is a wretched palace, and you are not King's children, you are disreputable children!
My actual disreputable motive was that I wanted to be the first to call it.
Their armed forces were an ill-equipped, untrained and sometimes disreputable lot.
"Theaters were in the disreputable part of town, with pimps and gallows and bear-baiting, " she said.
They have a young daughter, Isabelle (Michelle Gylemo), and a disreputable best friend, David (Krister Henriksson).
